creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to corvid from comment #0)
I do not see any problems here. Line 2620 should copy all sc->mode content including accelfactor member in to internal ioctl buffer.
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd/blob/releng/11.2/sys/dev/atkbdc/psm.c#L2620

Could you provide a test case?
